title: lepechinia chilensis
intro: Lepechinia chilensis, also known as Chilean mountain mint, is a perennial plant native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Lepechinia chilensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Lepechinia chilensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Andean medicine to treat various ailments.
